landing.heroTitle1: Smart School Space: Unified Platform for
landing.heroSubtitle: Replace fragmented WhatsApp groups, scattered spreadsheets, and manual scheduling with one intelligent ecosystem designed for modern schools.
landing.problemSubtitle: Schools rely on disconnected tools that waste time and lose data. Smart School Space brings everything together.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed specifically for K-12 administration.
landing.schedulerSubtitle: Our AI generates optimal timetables and highlights conflicts before they happen.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your institution's needs.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join 500+ schools already using Smart School Space to streamline operations and improve outcomes.
landing.copyright: © 2026 Smart School Space. All rights reserved.

testimonials.t1: Smart School Space reduced our admin workload by 60%. The scheduler alone saved us 15 hours per week.
testimonials.t2: The unified communication replaced 12 different WhatsApp groups. Parents love the transparency.
testimonials.t3: College acceptance rates improved 23% after implementing the College Prep Hub.

generator.promptPlaceholder: Write wishes... e.g. math as first lesson.
generator.readyDesc: Select parallels, bell template and write your wishes in the chat. The AI will analyze the entire school database and create an optimal schedule.
generator.welcomeMsg: 👋 Hello! I'm your AI scheduling assistant. Select parallels on the left, then write your wishes — for example, when to schedule certain subjects. I'll consider the entire school database: teachers, rooms, workload and constraints.
